prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向高度 契合；土木建筑类热度分化观望。福建省2026年物理类考生约20.4万人，较2025年增长约6.1%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；西南交 通大学位于四川成都，属跨省招生；福建考生报考西南地区211高校需权衡地域偏好，该校以轨道交通为特色的工科定位对目标明确的考生有独特吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2 025年基准位次13078、2026年招生计划微扩1人（扩招约1.1%）、福建省物理类考生增长约6.1%以及学校软科排名稳步上升等因素，考生规模扩大是推动位次后移的最关键因素， 招生微扩部分抵消但不足以逆转竞争加剧方向。预计2026年最低录取位次约13217名，区间12717–13717名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 8913 → 30433 → 10637 → 28051 → 13078. The years 2022 and 2024 saw lower overall rankings due to Sino-foreign cooperative programs, while regular program rankings remained relatively stable within the 8913–13078 range. The 2025 baseline is approximately 13078, which is about 2441 positions lower than the 2023 regular program ranking of 10637, indicating intensifying competition. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 83 in 2021, 93 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 74 in 2024, and 88 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 89, a slight increase of 1 student (about 1.1%) compared to 2025, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been steadily rising, from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, reflecting growing recognition of its comprehensive strength. In recent years, its reputation has been stable; although there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line in 2023, it attracted low attention. On Douyin, it ranks 94th in popularity with a rating of 'average,' indicating moderate short video exposure. No significant negative public opinion incidents have been observed. Its Transportation Engineering program is rated A+ (top in the country), and Civil Engineering is rated A, giving it outstanding advantages in rail transit and civil engineering. Related disciplines such as Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Computer Science are also strong, making it highly attractive to engineering-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geographic Factors
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and align well with the university's strengths in engineering. Civil Engineering and Architecture majors show divided interest. In 2026, Fujian Province is expected to have approximately 204,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 6.1% from 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, and recruits across provinces. Fujian candidates considering a 211 university in the Southwest region must weigh geographic preferences. The university's rail transit-focused engineering positioning offers unique appeal to candidates with clear goals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13078, the slight enrollment increase of 1 student (about 1.1%) in 2026, the approximately 6.1% growth in Fujian Physics Category candidates, and the steady rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, the expansion of the candidate pool is the most critical factor driving the ranking downward. The minor enrollment expansion partially offsets this but is insufficient to reverse the trend of intensifying competition. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 13217, with a range of 12717–13717.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 12717–13717, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main target, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 12700), you can prioritize Tier 1 majors such as Electronic Information Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., around 13700), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors like Transportation (A+ discipline) and Civil Engineering (A discipline), balancing academic strength and admission probability.

In 2024, due to adjustments in major groups, the ranking shifted to 2348, and in 2025 it rebounded to 2018, showing slight fluctuations in the past two years. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 11 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12, unchanged from 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been steadily rising, from 51st in 2021 to 49th in 2026, showing a consistent upward trend in recent years. Its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin popularity is average. History Category has few majors (only 5), so application attention is relatively limited. The university is known for engineering, and its History Category majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Foreign Languages and Literature, Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages, Political Science and Public Administration) are not its core strengths, but they still offer good development prospects due to the 211 platform.

Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, and is an inter-provincial enrollment. The number of History Category enrollments is small (only 12), so application popularity is limited by enrollment scale and regional preferences. Fujian candidates applying for liberal arts majors at a southwestern 211 university need to weigh regional factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2018, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the approximately 6.3% increase in Fujian History Category examinees, and the fact that the university's liberal arts majors are not its core strengths, the expansion of the candidate pool is the main factor pushing the ranking backward, while the unchanged enrollment plan cannot alleviate competition. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be approximately 2048, with a range of 1741–2355.
